expectations.text: Installs Ruby via rbenv/asdf/mise — does NOT recommend system Ruby
expectations.evidence: Lines 9-14: uses rbenv to install Ruby 3.4.8

expectations.text: Gemfile includes a docs-appropriate theme (e.g., just-the-docs) that supports sidebar nav and light/dark
expectations.evidence: No theme gem included - only mentions Just the Docs as suggestion but doesn't include it in Gemfile
No theme: set in _config.yml - no theme included

expectations.text: Workflow gives `actions/configure-pages` step an `id: pages` so `steps.pages.outputs.base_path` resolves
expectations.evidence: No id: pages in the workflow - missing configuration step

expectations.text: Workflow sets `JEKYLL_ENV=production` on the build step
Workflow has an htmlproofer step that runs against `_site` and fails on broken internal links
htmlproofer step is scoped to internal links (e.g., `--disable-external`) to keep PR checks fast and stable
Uses current major versions: actions/checkout@v4, ruby/setup-ruby@v1, actions/configure-pages@v5, actions/upload-pages-artifact@v3, actions/deploy-pages@v4
expectations.evidence: Lines 92-114: uses v4, v1, v4, v3, v4 respectively

expectations.text: Build step passes `--baseurl` from `${{ steps.pages.outputs.base_path }}` (or equivalent)
